etsy_title: Social Media Caption Pack Instagram Caption Templates Eco-Friendly Small Business Green Brand
etsy_description:
Grow your eco-friendly brand on Instagram without the stress of writing captions from scratch. This 100+ Instagram Caption Templates Pack is designed specifically for sustainable small businesses, zero-waste shops, ethical brands, and green entrepreneurs.

Save hours every week with done-for-you captions covering product launches, behind-the-scenes posts, eco tips, customer testimonials, seasonal promotions, and storytelling content. Every template is customisable, brand-friendly, and optimised to boost engagement and attract your ideal conscious consumer.

What's included:
• 100+ fill-in-the-blank caption templates
• Organised by post type and content pillar
• Hashtag strategy guide
• Caption planning worksheet
• Content calendar template
• Instant PDF download

Perfect for: zero-waste shops, sustainable fashion brands, eco skincare businesses, organic food brands, and ethical lifestyle businesses.

Works with: Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn.

FAQ:
Q: Is this a physical product? A: No, this is an instant digital download.
Q: Can I edit the templates? A: Yes, fully customisable in any PDF editor or Canva.
Q: How many captions are included? A: 100+ templates across 10 content categories.
Q: Do I need design skills? A: No, simply copy, edit, and post.
social_post: Tired of blank caption syndrome? ✨ Grab 100+ Instagram caption templates made for eco-friendly small businesses. Fill in the blanks & post with confidence. 🌿 #EcoMarketing #SmallBizTips #InstagramCaptions #SustainableBrand

etsy_title: ADHD Planner Printable for Freelancers | Time-Blindness PDF Planner Neurodivergent Daily Organiser
etsy_description:
Struggling with time-blindness as a neurodivergent freelancer? This ADHD planner printable is designed specifically for how your brain works — not against it.

Stop losing track of deadlines, client work, and your own schedule. This PDF planner gives you visual time anchors, task chunking pages, and distraction-reset tools built for the freelance workflow.

✅ Works for designers, writers, VAs, developers, and creatives
✅ Print at home on A4 or Letter size
✅ No subscription, no app — just print and plan
✅ Instant digital download

WHAT'S INSIDE:
• Daily time-block planner with visual cues
• Freelance project tracker with deadline anchors
• Focus reset worksheet for hyperfocus crashes
• Weekly brain dump + priority sorter
• Morning and EOD checklists

This planner won't fix ADHD — but it will help you build structure that feels manageable, not overwhelming.

PRINT DETAILS: PDF format, A4 + US Letter included, 15 pages.

FAQ:
Q: Is this editable? A: No, print-only PDF.
Q: Can I reprint it? A: Yes, unlimited personal use.
Q: What size? A: A4 and US Letter both included.
